title: Summarizing News Articles
scenario: Read a news article (approx. 200-300 words) and generate a concise 1-paragraph summary. The LLM should identify the main topic, key points, and any relevant statistics or quotes. Assume the article is on a current event and the publication is reputable.
constraints: Must include the article's title and the name of the publication

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the output meets all the constraints provided.
Evaluate the accuracy of the summary, including the main topic, key points, and any relevant statistics or quotes.
Assess the tone of the summary, ensuring it is neutral and unbiased.
Evaluate the formatting of the output, ensuring it is concise and clear.
